title: GBP Audit
content_md:
# GBP Audit

- Code: f19ca55d
- Source: https://www.skool.com/ai-seo-mastery-pro/classroom/63a81f62?md=f19ca55d108c45d297f6a5a945142185
- Video: https://www.loom.com/share/d0cf6c53922842be8c463218b1fa071b?hide_owner=true&hide_share=true&hide_title=true&hideEmbedTopBar=true
- Duration: 8m 55s

## Description

_(no description)_

transcript.text: show you how we do a GBP audit. I'm going to use a real client as an example. I'm going to use the
right-way driving school. I'm not going to fill up this GBP review in great detail
because I've done this before, so I don't need to fill this all out. This is really here for
something that we would maybe send the client or to remind us to make sure we're looking at every
aspect of the GBP. So when we do a GBP review, the most important things that we're looking for
are going to be the categories and the services. So this is the GBP and this is the GBP. Okay, so
what we're going to do, we can see the categories if we hit edit profile, then we can see the category
here. This is primary and then we can add additional categories. So right now this business only has
one category, but if I close out of that and if I hit edit services, this is where all the services
are. So again, we can see the primary category and all the services under that category
and here we can again add other business categories. So you don't need to add the
categories under the profile, we can do under services also. So driving school is their primary.
My favorite way to see additional potential categories is if we go to GMB everywhere and then
we go into the AI tools section, we go to GMB category finder and then all this enter driving school.
So this tells us there are 673,000 GBPs in the world that use driving school as a category.
Those GBPs, these are common related categories. So what we're going to do is just go through each
one of these and see if they're relevant to this client, driver's license training school,
that sounds pretty relevant, driver's license training school is the same one, no problem,
learn a driving training area, maybe driving test center, training center. So we'll go through this
again, choose the ones that I think are relevant. I'm going to err on the side of
broad though because I'm not the client, I don't know everything about their business.
So driver's license office, that's probably not relevant. That sounds like it's, you know, a DMV,
a government agency, driving test center, same thing that feels like it's a DMV,
driver's license office, again, sounds the same thing, car rental agency, I'm pretty sure they
don't do that. But for something like training consultant, yeah, maybe that's accurate, maybe
they're training consultant, I'm going to go ahead and capture it. So when we go to the
Google business profile, multiple categories, we're really just going to suggest all the additional
categories that we might add. So for when we give this to the client, maybe I'll copy this one,
try again, there we go. Why is it not pasting? Paste. Okay, cool. And then I'll come through any
other training center, maybe that one, I guess I'll right click and paste, that's fine.
Learner driving training area, that might be relevant. So here, we're not necessarily filling
in all of the different categories for the client, we're just capturing everything that might be
relevant. Okay. And then related services, I'm just going to hit view more, I'm going to copy
all of these services. I'll jump over to Claude, and we'll put in this prompt, which is in the
pro training, driving school company in garden city, and copy these. Why that looks like that?
Okay. So we have some additional services here, which is great. And then what we'll do is,
I can give all of these categories, and just say, please organize these according to the category
they are most semantically relevant to. And then we'll say primary category is driving school,
and secondary categories. Okay. So, and the point of this, we want to get an organized list
that we can give to the client, we can have a discussion, hey, which of these are relevant
to you, which of these make sense to you. So we have all of these under driving school,
then we have these under drivers like training school training center, excellent. So we can
grab all of these, and basically put them under here, just to list all the services and categories,
and then just get feedback from the client. Do these make sense? Do we want to put these on here?
Are these categories, are these services that you offer? Okay. So once we have that, we're going
to come and make sure everything is filled out. So if I come into edit profile, descriptions filled
out, opening date, contact, chat, great website, social profiles, all of this service areas.
So here, more from the business. So this we would want to add, there's nothing there.
Amenities, crowd parking, we want to add some things there. This fine. Normally we would lock
this so that Google doesn't do this, but this is a brand new client and service options. Yeah. So
do we offer online classes? No. So really, we're just going to go through and make sure that every
single box is completely filled out. Special hours, that is a big one. It's very common for
businesses to miss this because you actually need to go in and edit special hours on a regular
basis. They only let you enter in the next few upcoming holidays. So if I come into hours and
special hours, there's none. And here I can only enter Martin Luther King Day and Washington's
birthday. So we have a reminder on a team member's calendar. Every couple of months, they'll go in,
make sure special hours are filled up for the upcoming holidays. This needs to be done regularly.
Okay. And then we can actually come into posts and see if they're posting regularly.
They have one post from six years ago. So definitely they need to do better there.
So yeah, we, let's see, service areas. We did see the service areas,
product and offers. I don't think they had anything there. So we can come into the product section.
And that's right here, just under edit products. And there's nothing there. Great. Now, a lot of
businesses won't have specific products. These are not just a repeat of your services.
These are specific products that you have on offer. So for example, right way driving school,
if they had a specific program and they called it, you know, the right way teen driving class.
And it was like a pack of three or four different sessions that met in small groups or something.
I don't know, I'm making this up. But then we could add that product, the right way teen driving
path to this product section, but we don't want to overlap anything with services. So
we'll just keep coming through there. We'll assume they don't have any, but we would certainly ask
them about it. Regular response reviews, they have 421 reviews. So we can see if they're responding
to it. We can come into read reviews and see what we have. We have no responses. Well, one response
here from a couple of weeks ago, from a couple of weeks ago, so they are responding just not
super quickly. And it looks like the response is the exact same response. So that's also not
awesome. They're just copy pasting it. The review response is a good way to insert potential
keywords for specific services that that reviewer might have done that the reviewer didn't put in
their actual review. And we can use AI to read a lot of these, but this is just to note, hey,
they're not actually putting reviews, responses for every review that are unique and interesting
on the GBP. What about photos? So we can see photos. We hit photos. And they do have a few photos,
not very many. So again, not enough photos. That's another comment that we would have that we need
more photos for this GBP Q&As. This is a deprecated feature. So we can delete that. Don't worry about
that. Service and service descriptions. We looked at that duplicate services. We want to make sure
there are no duplicate services. Okay, so that is how we do a GBP audit. That's the first step we do
for every new client. And again, the focus, make sure the categories and services are correct.
Then we just want to make sure that the rest of the GBP is filled out appropriately.
